sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_test (id UInt64, start_index UInt64, end_index UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3Line(start_index, end_index) AS line_indices FROM h3_test WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM h3_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 10;

SELECT id, h3Line((SELECT start_index FROM h3_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT end_index FROM h3_test WHERE id = 2)) AS line_indices FROM h3_test WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM h3_test WHERE id <= 2) HAVING length(line_indices) > 0;

SELECT start_index, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT h3Line(start_index, end_index) AS line_indices FROM h3_test) GROUP BY start_index HAVING cnt != ANY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id FROM h3_test WHERE (start_index, end_index) != ANY (SELECT start_index, end_index FROM h3_test WHERE start_index <= 590080540275638272);
SELECT h3Line(start_index, end_index) AS line_indices FROM h3_test WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM h3_test WHERE start_index IS NULL) ORDER BY start_index DESC;
ALTER TABLE h3_test ADD COLUMN new_value Int32 DEFAULT 0;
UPDATE h3_test SET new_value = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL) WHERE start_index != ANY (SELECT end_index FROM h3_test);
